name: ms-handball
prompt: An indoor handball match moment, a player leaping high to shoot at goal, polished arena floor with soft reflections, dramatic side lighting, spectators blurred in deep shadow.

name: ms-basketball
prompt: An indoor basketball game moment, a player driving toward the hoop mid-stride, glossy hardwood court reflections, dramatic arena spotlight from above, moody dark stands.

name: ms-rugby
prompt: An outdoor rugby moment at dusk under floodlights, players contesting a high ball in a lineout, light mist catching the beams, wet grass, dark sky.

name: ms-volleyball
prompt: An indoor volleyball match, a player rising to spike at the net with arms extended, arena lighting from the side, polished court, dark moody background.

name: sc-sprint
prompt: An athlete performing an explosive sprint and agility drill between training cones on an outdoor track at dusk, wearing a GPS performance monitoring vest, strong forward motion, floodlit from behind creating a rim light.

name: sc-gym
prompt: A strength and conditioning session in a performance gym, an athlete mid barbell back-squat with chalk dust in the air, dramatic low key lighting, focused intense atmosphere, framed from the side.

name: sc-monitor
prompt: A strength and conditioning coach reviewing athlete performance data on a tablet at the edge of an indoor training facility, soft cool screen glow on the hands, focused expression turned away, framed on hands and tablet, no readable text on screen.
